overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Watch Dogs: Legion) showing a character walking through a rainy night in a futuristic London. The character moves from narrow sidewalks past historic stone buildings, crosses intersections near a gothic train station, and continues through wet city streets with reflective surfaces and visible rainfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow city sidewalk with historic buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, approaching a large gothic building in the distance

notable_agents.action: walking with an umbrella, passing by the digital billboard

entered.detail: tall historic stone building with multiple windows and closed shutters
multi-lane road with wet asphalt and moving traffic
large gothic-style building with arched windows and illuminated facade, resembling a train station
tall street lamp casting yellow light on the wet pavement
illuminated advertisement screen displaying purple and blue graphics
classic red telephone booth with illuminated signage on top

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wet sidewalk at night, flanked by historic stone buildings on the right and a multi-lane street on the left. The street lamps cast warm light on the reflective pavement as the character approaches a large gothic building in the distance. A digital billboard and red phone booth become visible ahead, while sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic moves through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza and crosswalk in front of gothic station

events.description: passes the red telephone booth and enters the open plaza area
crosses the street at the crosswalk in front of the gothic station

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and navigating through the plaza area in front of the large gothic building

notable_agents.action: red double-decker bus driving past the gothic station

entered.detail: futuristic red double-decker bus with illuminated windows and sleek design
white emergency vehicle with yellow and blue markings parked near the station
zebra crossing with white stripes on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character exits the narrow sidewalk and enters a wide open plaza in front of the illuminated gothic station. Crossing the street at the crosswalk, the character passes other pedestrians while a red double-decker bus and police van are visible near the station entrance. The historic buildings recede into the background as the character moves into the intersection.

events.description: turns left at the intersection and continues down a new street
waits for a black taxi to pass before continuing across the road

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and walking along a new street with modern architecture

notable_agents.action: ambulance with flashing lights driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall modern building with glass facade and illuminated windows
emergency vehicle with yellow and green markings and flashing lights
illuminated storefront sign reading 'FITNESS' in white letters

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at the intersection, leaving the gothic station behind, and enters a street with modern office buildings. An ambulance with flashing lights drives through the intersection as the character navigates around pedestrians and waiting vehicles. A fitness center sign becomes visible on the right as the character continues down the wet street.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city street with parked cars

events.description: rain begins falling visibly, creating streaks and ripples on the wet surfaces

agents.ego_description: walking down the street as rain falls more heavily, passing parked cars and other pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: walking with a patterned umbrella, moving in the opposite direction

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles including a silver sedan and black taxi along the curb
visible rain streaks falling through the street light beams and creating ripples on puddles

segments.scene_description: As the character continues down the street, rain begins to fall visibly, creating streaks in the street lights and ripples on the wet pavement. The character passes parked cars on the left and pedestrians with umbrellas on the right. The modern buildings give way to more historic stone facades as the rainfall intensifies, reflecting off the glossy street surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy London night, transitioning from narrow historic sidewalks to a wide urban plaza and finally into a modern commercial district. It begins beside stone buildings on a wet sidewalk, moving past a red phone booth and digital billboard toward a distant gothic structure. As the character exits the narrow path, the scene opens into a wide plaza in front of the illuminated station, crossing a busy intersection populated by pedestrians, a red double-decker bus, and a police van. The camera then turns left, shifting away from the gothic architecture toward modern office buildings and a fitness center as an ambulance with flashing lights passes through the intersection. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly saturated as visible rain begins to fall, creating streaks in the street lights and ripples on the glossy pavement while the character passes pedestrians with umbrellas.
